phase.en: EarthLivingCore 0.9.4 is live with a developer-only Border Control build generator for compact neutral border facilities. PassportBorders 0.5.2 and the VS3.5 TAB placeholders remain live.
phase.da: EarthLivingCore 0.9.4 er live med en developer-only Border Control build generator til kompakte neutrale grænsefaciliteter. PassportBorders 0.5.2 og VS3.5 TAB placeholders er stadig live.
